learning: MAJOR UPGRADE: Operator ESP32 transformed into BlackRoad AI Phone! Full iPhone-replica OS with lock screen, home screen with app grid, status bar, AI Assistant app, Decision Hub, Network monitor, Settings. Native AI operating system with touch gestures, multi-screen navigation, and official BlackRoad gradient colors. Swipe up to unlock, tap apps to launch. Complete iOS-style UX on ESP32 hardware. See ~/ceo-hub-esp32/src/main.cpp for full OS code.
